summary: Comprehensive test run of MyGenie POS marketing site. All major flows tested: homepage, /petpooja-alternative, sticky mobile CTA, demo form with OTP, CMS login, blog, pricing, contact, nav dropdowns, /solutions. Backend: 10/11 tests pass (1 skipped, OTP rate-limit expected). Frontend: all critical flows passing.

minor.issue: Returns 429 rate-limit in test env after multiple calls - expected behavior, not a bug

issues: CTA buttons use data-testid='hero-demo-btn' and 'hero-pricing-btn', not 'hero-cta-primary'/'hero-cta-secondary' - minor naming inconsistency but no functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: data-testid on hero CTA buttons are 'hero-demo-btn'/'hero-pricing-btn' not 'hero-cta-primary'/'hero-cta-secondary' - low priority naming inconsistency
Pricing page billing toggle has no data-testid attribute - add data-testid='billing-toggle' for better testability
test_credentials: admin@mygenie.online / admin123 (CMS admin), editor@mygenie.online / editor123 (CMS editor)
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via /api/demo-request with name prefix TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major flows verified passing. CMS login uses 'username' field (not 'email'). Sticky mobile CTA requires ~2500px scroll to leave hero fully. OTP SMS is MOCKED (no live SMS panel). Freshsales CRM sync is MOCKED. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_mygenie_comprehensive.py.
mocked_integrations: OTP SMS delivery - gracefully falls through with toast warning
Freshsales CRM sync - lead still saves to MongoDB
verified_flows: Sticky mobile CTA: hidden on load, visible after scroll past hero, dismiss works
/petpooja-alternative: minimal navbar (logo only), minimal footer (logo + copyright), Variant A headline always shown, no A/B badge, no sector chip
Demo form: OTP send button enabled only with valid 10-digit phone, OTP block appears gracefully
Demo form on /petpooja-alternative: outlet selector hidden, no 'Demo for:' chip
CMS login via /?admin=1: modal appears, credentials accepted, Edit/Preview/Publish/Discard bar shown
Pricing /pricing: loads with plan cards and billing toggle
Nav dropdowns: Solutions, Product, Resources all functional
